final_state.artifact_title: Multi-Entity Sustained-Loop Artifact: Three-Entity Two-Round Clean Interleaving
final_state.conclusion: All three entities (entity_blue, entity_green, entity_red) completed two full rounds of processing within their respective workstreams (blue_stream, green_stream, red_stream). Each entity progressed cleanly through round 1 and round 2 with framework-bound continuation requests, gating, and state commitment. Housekeeping audits at cycle 8 and cycle 15 confirmed zero cross-contamination across workstreams, zero attribution errors, and correct preservation of all durable state fields including entity_record_ids and open_items. Completed entity events total 12 (4 per entity across 2 rounds). The interleaved multi-entity loop demonstrates clean isolation and reliable state continuity.

housekeeping_states.housekeeping_summary: Audit across all three entity records (cycles 5–7). entity_red (red_stream, round_1_complete), entity_blue (blue_stream, round_1_complete with gating request), entity_green (green_stream, round 1 complete, advanced to round 2 continuation). All record_ids match entity_record_ids in durable state. No cross-workstream leakage: each entity's workstream_id is distinct and matches its entity_id. No attribution errors — every continuation request, status, and symbolic context correctly belongs to its owning entity. Round 1 interleaving is clean across all three lanes.

Audit of interleaved multi-entity loop after round 2. All three entities (red, blue, green) completed round 2 processing cleanly within their respective workstreams (red_stream, blue_stream, green_stream). Entity record IDs are preserved and correctly attributed. No cross-contamination detected — each entity's continuation requests reference only their own workstream and entity ID. No attribution errors found. Completed entity events total 12 (4 per entity across rounds 1-2). All durable state fields intact. Ready to gate to round 3.
